pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-K-004 (Operational Excellence/Knowledge) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.466, highest: O*NET at 0.466). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Data quality framework management, DQ metrics/profiling/monitoring, quality rules, remediation oversight, and cross-functional quality standards at a manager level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.466, and Operational Excellence (OP) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Operational Excellence KSA for Data Quality Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Operational Excellence competencies do not appear as Data Quality Manager requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. Operational Excellence is not a Data Quality Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
